tagline: Bringing the Farm Fresh to Your Doorstep

hero.headline: Get Fresh Produce Delivered to You!
hero.subtext: Quality fruits and vegetables straight from our farm.

website.about: At Fresh Farm Produce, we are dedicated to providing you with the freshest, organic fruits and vegetables. Our produce is harvested daily to ensure you get the best quality right at your doorstep. We believe in supporting local farmers and promoting healthy eating.

products.name: Organic Tomatoes
products.description: Juicy and ripe organic tomatoes perfect for your stews and sauces.

products.name: Fresh Spinach
products.description: Nutritious spinach, freshly picked and ready for your salads or soups.

products.name: Sweet Potatoes
products.description: Delicious and healthy sweet potatoes, great for baking or boiling.
